seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Yuna and South Yunderup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Yuna vs South Yunderup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Yuna and South Yunderup.
heading: South Yuna vs South Yunderup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Yuna, Western Australia and South Yunderup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Yuna has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to South Yunderup (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Yuna or South Yunderup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Yuna has a flood risk score of 45/100, while South Yunderup scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Yuna scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. South Yunderup scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Yuna or South Yunderup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Yuna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
